name: Miracle Automation Engineering Co.,Ltd
summary: Miracle Automation Engineering Co.,Ltd provides intelligent equipment solutions and services in China and internationally. The company is involved in the research and development of equipment logistics equipment. It also offers waste automobile recycling and dismantling, crushing and sorting resource utilization, and automobile dismantling equipment, as well as trades automobile recycling parts through e-commerce; manufacturing equipment for automotive, new energy, and machinery industries; and intelligent equipment logistics and system equipment for automobile manufacturing, airport logistics, commercial distribution, and others. In addition, the company provides large-scale wind turbine components, diesel engine parts, and gas turbine parts; and professional logistics solutions and turnkey project services. Further, it is involved in the design, construction, system integration, procurement, and consulting of photovoltaic power stations. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Miracle Logistics System Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Miracle Automation Engineering Co., Ltd. in April 2013. Miracle Automation Engineering Co.,Ltd was founded in 1984 and is based in Wuxi, China.
